metadata.title: FlowDockr Payment
metadata.description: Send stronger payment reminders and reduce outstanding invoices.

hero.title: Get paid without awkward follow-ups.
hero.description: FlowDockr Payment gives you structured reminder messages and payment term language for late invoices.

features.title: What Payment solves
features.description: Standardize follow-up and protect payment terms from day one.

items.title: Late final payment
items.description: Use firm, professional reminders tied to agreed terms.

items.title: Unclear payment deadlines
items.description: Clarify due date windows and next actions in one message.

items.title: Need escalation path
items.description: Move from friendly reminder to formal follow-up with consistency.

usage.label: Workflow
usage.title: Recover payment in 3 steps
usage.description: Keep tone professional while increasing response rate.

items.title: Capture invoice context
items.description: Amount, due date, and delivery status.

items.title: Generate reminder
items.description: Create an email-ready follow-up with clear ask and deadline.

items.title: Escalate with structure
items.description: Use tiered follow-ups if payment remains overdue.

cta.title: Pair Payment with Scope for stronger terms.
cta.description: Clear scope + clear payment terms = fewer disputes and faster collections.
